scripts.build: tsc --build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const src=p.join(__dirname,'src','prompts');const dst=p.join(__dirname,'dist','prompts');fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(src)){if(f.endsWith('.txt')||f.endsWith('.json')){fs.copyFileSync(p.join(src,f),p.join(dst,f))}}"
